subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of God! In every breath an ocean of bounties doth flow from the Abhá Kingdom, and in every hour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی در هر دمی از ملکوت ابهی یمی از فیوضات فائض و در هر ساعتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
